product_data.Features: 65-inch OLED evo panel, 4K 120Hz, Dolby Vision IQ, Dolby Atmos, webOS 23, Game Optimizer with 4x HDMI 2.1 ports, AI Picture Pro

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message:
Hello there!

I hope you're doing well. I came across your listing for the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV and I must say, I'm really impressed by the features it offers. I was wondering if there is any room for negotiation on the price? 

Looking forward to hearing from you!

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: Hello! You've made an excellent choice with the LG C3 65-inch OLED. Its stunning picture quality, advanced gaming features, and overall performance truly set it apart. We strive to offer the best value for such a premium TV. What price point were you considering?

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Thank you for your kind words. I have a budget of $880.00 for this purchase. What price can you offer me for the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV?

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: I appreciate your offer, but $880 is significantly below our cost for this premium LG C3 65-inch OLED TV. Given its incredible features like the OLED evo panel, 120Hz refresh rate, and advanced gaming capabilities, we typically don't go much below the retail price. What's the highest you're able to go to acquire this top-tier television?

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: I understand the value of the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV. Unfortunately, my budget is firm at $880. If you're unable to meet that price, I'll have to explore other options within my budget.

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: I understand your budget constraints, and I truly wish I could meet that price. However, $880 is below the absolute minimum we can offer for the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV. This model is packed with cutting-edge technology, and we simply cannot sell it at that point. I encourage you to consider its long-term value and immersive experience.

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Thank you for your understanding. I appreciate your insight into the value of the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV. If $880 is below your absolute minimum, I understand and will have to explore other options within my budget.

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: I understand your decision to explore other options. Unfortunately, $880 is below our absolute minimum for the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV. If you find your budget

conversation_history.message: Thank you for your understanding. I will continue my search for a TV that fits within my budget. If there are any future promotions or discounts that bring the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV within my price range, I would be interested to know. Thank you for your time.

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: You're welcome. While $880 is below our minimum for the LG C3 65-inch OLED, if you find you can stretch your budget slightly for this exceptional TV, please don't hesitate to reach out. Its unmatched performance truly speaks for itself.
